title: Mosaic Consulting UKG Pro Contract Approval and Payroll Modernization Funding Clarification
summary: Council member Williams presents Mosaic Consulting Group agreement for UKG Pro software implementation (payroll modernization) following previous day's committee meeting. Budget staff clarifies: $6.25M previously approved, $3.7M spent, approximately $2.5M remaining — no new funding requested. Contract is 18-month term from execution. Council identifies need for new request letter with corrected timeframe (originally introduced Sept/Oct 2025). Item 41 deferred to Wednesday executive session. Also: IT Director presents item 42 opening discussion.
